summary: IMP2 VIEW DETAILS button feature tested. After Expo restart (to clear Metro cache), VIEW DETAILS button renders correctly on past completed sessions with stats.sets > 0. Full flow tested: Schedule tab → VIEW DETAILS → session-detail → back navigation all working.
action_items: NOTE: VIEW DETAILS was not visible before Expo restart (Metro cache was stale). After `sudo supervisorctl restart expo`, the button appeared correctly. This is not a code bug - just a cache issue in the preview environment.
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIEW DETAILS button works on current week past sessions (Heavy Lower Mon Apr 13). Session-detail page shows Heavy Lower header, Monday Apr 13 2026 date, SETS/VOLUME/AVG RPE stats row, EXERCISES(1) section with expandable Test Exercise card showing Set 1: 200 lbs × 5 reps @RPE 7. Back navigation (browser back) returns to Schedule tab successfully.
rca_of_issue: Metro bundler cache was stale - old bundle was served without the new VIEW DETAILS button code. Expo restart forced rebundle. No code changes were needed.
